message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 18 VT conformance fixtures for untested actions

Cover previously untested Action variants and edge cases:
- Backspace: basic, at origin, multiple
- NEL (ESC E): basic and scroll-at-bottom
- ScrollDown (SD): cursor stays, in-region
- ScrollUp (SU): in-region
- SoftReset (DECSTR): clears modes, preserves screen
- ECH: mid-row erase
- SGR colors: indexed fg/bg, RGB, named fg reset, combined attrs
- Wide chars: basic CJK placement, wrap at end of row

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "backspace_multiple",
+  "description": "Multiple BS moves cursor back to column 0",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "48454c4c4f080808080857",
+  "comment": "Print HELLO at (0,0)-(0,4), cursor (0,5); BS x5 to (0,0); print W overwrites H; cursor (0,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "W" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "L" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "L" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "O" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+{
+  "name": "backspace_overwrite",
+  "description": "BS moves cursor left; overwrite then continue",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142434445080858",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE at (0,0)-(0,4); BS twice to (0,3); print X overwrites D; cursor at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 4
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "C"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "E"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+{
+  "name": "ech_mid_row",
+  "description": "ECH erases N characters at cursor position without moving cursor",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b313b32481b5b3258",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE at (0,0)-(0,4); CUP(1,2) to (0,1); ECH(2) erases (0,1) and (0,2) to blanks; cursor stays at (0,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "D"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "E"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "next_line_basic",
+  "description": "NEL (ESC E) moves cursor to start of next line",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142431b4558",
+  "comment": "Print ABC at (0,0)-(0,2), cursor (0,3); NEL: col=0, move down to (1,0); print X; cursor (1,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "X" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "next_line_scrolls_at_bottom",
+  "description": "NEL at bottom row triggers scroll up then moves to col 0",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41421b5b323b314843441b5b333b314845461b4558",
+  "comment": "Print AB row 0; CUP(2,1) print CD row 1; CUP(3,1) print EF row 2; NEL scrolls: row 0=CD, row 1=EF, row 2=blank; cursor (2,0); print X; cursor (2,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "X" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "soft_reset_clears_modes",
+  "description": "DECSTR (CSI ! p) clears IRM so subsequent print overwrites instead of inserting",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414141411b5b34681b5b21701b5b313b324858",
+  "comment": "Print AAAA at (0,0)-(0,3); set IRM (CSI 4 h); soft reset (CSI ! p) clears IRM; CUP(1,2) to (0,1); print X overwrites (0,1); cursor (0,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "A" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+{
+  "name": "soft_reset_preserves_screen",
+  "description": "DECSTR preserves screen content; only resets modes/attrs/scroll region",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b323b3148464748494a1b5b2170",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE row 0 (pending_wrap); CUP(2,1) to (1,0); print FGHIJ row 1 (pending_wrap); soft reset: clears pending_wrap/modes/attrs; screen unchanged; cursor stays (1,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "G" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": "H" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 3, "char": "I" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "J" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+{
+  "name": "scroll_down_cursor_stays",
+  "description": "SD scrolls content down; cursor position unchanged",
+  "initial_size": [
+    5,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b323b3148421b5b333b3148431b5b3154",
+  "comment": "Print A at (0,0); CUP(2,1) B at (1,0); CUP(3,1) C at (2,0); SD(1): row 0=blank, row 1=old A, row 2=old B; cursor stays at (2,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 2,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 2,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "B"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+{
+  "name": "scroll_down_in_region",
+  "description": "SD within scroll region shifts only region rows; outside untouched",
+  "initial_size": [6, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "5a5a1b5b323b314841411b5b333b314842421b5b343b314843431b5b353b314857571b5b323b34721b5b3154",
+  "comment": "Print ZZ row 0; CUP rows 2-5: AA BB CC WW; DECSTBM(2,4) sets region [1,4); cursor homes (0,0); SD(1): row 1=blank, row 2=AA, row 3=BB; rows 0,4 untouched",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 1, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "W" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 1, "char": "W" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+{
+  "name": "scroll_up_in_region",
+  "description": "SU within scroll region shifts only region rows up; outside untouched",
+  "initial_size": [6, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "5a5a1b5b323b314841411b5b333b314842421b5b343b314843431b5b353b314857571b5b323b34721b5b3153",
+  "comment": "Print ZZ row 0; CUP rows 2-5: AA BB CC WW; DECSTBM(2,4) region [1,4); cursor homes (0,0); SU(1): row 1=BB, row 2=CC, row 3=blank; rows 0(ZZ) and 4(WW) untouched",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 1, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "W" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 1, "char": "W" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "wide_char_wrap",
+  "description": "Wide char at end of row wraps to next line when DECAWM on",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344e4b8ad",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD at (0,0)-(0,3), cursor (0,4); print 中 (2-col) — only 1 col left, wraps to (1,0)-(1,1); cursor (1,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "中" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
